item.title: Testing a Walmart Cake
item.description: Tasting and reviewing a Walmart cake to see how it compares.

media:content.media:title: Testing a Walmart Cake
media:content.media:description: Tasting and reviewing a Walmart cake to see how it compares.

item.title: Are Costco Baked Goods Worth It?
item.description: Taking a closer look at Costco baked goods and sharing a taste test to see how they compare.

media:content.media:title: Are Costco Baked Goods Worth It?
media:content.media:description: Taking a closer look at Costco baked goods and sharing a taste test to see how they compare.

item.title: Less Oil, No Spatter, No Double Frying!
item.description: I'm testing a method of cooking french fries that begins with cold oil, resulting in perfectly cooked fries with no spatter, less oil, AND no double frying. Let's do this!

media:content.media:title: Less Oil, No Spatter, No Double Frying!
media:content.media:description: I'm testing a method of cooking french fries that begins with cold oil, resulting in perfectly cooked fries with no spatter, less oil, AND no double frying. Let's do this!

item.title: Is This Fruit WORTH The $55?
item.description: We test this rare fruit costing $55 to see if it actually delivers on taste, quality, and overall value.

media:content.media:title: Is This Fruit WORTH The $55?
media:content.media:description: We test this rare fruit costing $55 to see if it actually delivers on taste, quality, and overall value.
